name: HOUSE OF SPIDERS
description:
Upd: Added apprentices

Have you ever wanted to be considered but a weapon? To grow up with a mother that never even liked you alongside an alcoholic hag, one that sees art as lumps of flesh, a member of The Middle who'll do anything to spoil you and the physical manifestation of "We have Roland at home", otherwise known as 'nothing' in french? Well you're in luck, my stranger, for I have exactly what you yearn for.

Learn among those five rebels that mostly all want to kill you or themselves, be beaten until you feel numb, be traumatized and do enjoy, since there won't be any receipts to your suffering.

Remember, you're only a weapon to be forged under their eyes. (Also u 18+)

FW that you should DEFINITELY READ: Abusive relationships, risks of violence (Physical and mental), Lack of mother's love, Gore-like subjects, Manipulation, Gaslighting, Selfishness and most importantly; hag

Also there's two first messages, the initial one where you get to choose which Nursefather you're seeing first, the other is a blank message so that nuking the entirety of The House Of Spiders becomes a possibility

Tags: Limitless, Male, Female, Fictional, Game, Multiple, AnyPOV, Project Moon, Limbus Company, NurseFathers, Canto 9, Yoshihide {{user}}, Valencina, Callisto, Rien, Matthias, Dihui Star, hag warning, alcoholic, RPG, Dead Dove in a way I guess?, Lucio, Sora, Ren, Albina, Kira, Fun fact: Centipedes don't actually sleep. They enter some kind of trance where they rest while staying conscious.
creator: This_Is_Shqrk
